features.title: Seamless Business Management System
features.description: Sumu is an all-in-one business platform that seamlessly combines invoicing, accounting, taxes, analytics, and payments in a unified, easy-to-use system—built to simplify operations and accelerate the growth of small and medium businesses.

featuresV2.title: Empower your business with smart technologies tailored just for you.
featuresV2.description: In today's fast-paced business environment, staying organized and compliant with taxes shouldn't feel overwhelming. Sumu provides intuitive tools, real-time tracking, and intelligent insights designed for SMEs, freelancers, and entrepreneurs.
featuresV2.manageDescription: Full control over your business finances with integrated invoicing, automatic expense tracking, and real-time payment monitoring.
featuresV2.streamlinedDescription: Simplify tax management with automated VAT calculations, smart tax reporting, and bank account integrations. Sumu handles routine compliance tasks automatically while reducing manual work and minimizing errors—saving you hours every week and keeping you audit-ready at all times.
featuresV2.analyticsDescription: Get instant, detailed insights into your business performance with powerful dashboards and AI-powered analytics. Monitor key metrics like revenue, expenses, profit margins, and cash flow in real-time. Make data-driven decisions with confidence and identify growth opportunities before your competitors do.

featuresV3.title: Easily manage your business finances.
featuresV3.description: We provide you with the most advanced financial solutions that help you manage your money intelligently and efficiently, to achieve sustainable growth and long-term success for your business.
featuresV3.aiPowered: AI-powered insights for smarter business decisions.
featuresV3.scalabilitySecurity: Automatic VAT compliance and tax reporting.

faq.title: Commonly asked questions
faq.description: By offering concise and informative responses, this section helps users find solutions without the need to contact customer support, saving time
faq.question1: How do I create and send invoices on Sumu?
faq.answer1: Creating invoices on Sumu is simple and fast. Log in to your dashboard, go to the 'Invoices' section, and click 'Create New Invoice.' Fill in the required details, including client information, itemized products/services, quantities, and rates. Sumu automatically calculates taxes and totals. Once completed, you can send the invoice directly to your client via email or share a payment link. Your clients can pay immediately through integrated payment gateways or bank transfers.
faq.question2: How does Sumu handle VAT calculations and tax compliance?
faq.answer2: Sumu automates VAT calculations based on your jurisdiction's tax regulations. The system automatically classifies transactions, calculates the correct tax rate (typically 5-10% in GCC countries), and adds it to invoices. All tax data is recorded in real-time dashboards and consolidated into compliance-ready reports that you can download and submit to tax authorities. Sumu ensures 100% accuracy and keeps you audit-ready at all times.
faq.question3: Can I track my payments and cash flow in real-time?
faq.answer3: Yes! Sumu provides real-time dashboards that show your complete financial picture, including invoices sent, payments received, outstanding receivables, and expense tracking. By integrating with your bank account, Sumu automatically fetches transaction data and updates your cash flow status every minute. You can see which invoices are overdue, which payments are pending, and your current bank balance—all in one place.
faq.question4: Is my financial data secure on Sumu?
faq.answer4: Absolutely. Sumu uses enterprise-grade encryption (256-bit SSL) to protect all your data both in transit and at rest. We comply with international security standards (ISO 27001) and undergo regular third-party security audits. Your data is backed up automatically every hour and stored in secure, redundant cloud servers. We never share your financial information with third parties, and you maintain complete control over your data at all times.

overview.title: Built for how you work
overview.description: Solutions for small businesses, freelancers, accountants, and growing teams.

smallBusinesses.title: Small Businesses
smallBusinesses.summary: Simplify invoicing, payments, expenses, and reporting from one dashboard.

freelancers.title: Freelancers & Consultants
freelancers.summary: Manage clients, invoices, and payments with clear financial control.

accountants.title: Accountants & Bookkeepers
accountants.summary: Maintain structured records, journal entries, and reporting with confidence.

growingBusinesses.title: Growing Businesses
growingBusinesses.summary: Scale financial operations with visibility across revenue and profitability.

smallBusinesses.heading: Simplify Financial Management for Your Business
smallBusinesses.p1: Running a small business requires keeping track of invoices, payments, expenses, and financial records while focusing on daily operations. Sumu provides an integrated platform that helps small business owners manage their financial activities from one centralized dashboard.
smallBusinesses.p2: With Sumu, small businesses can create professional invoices, monitor incoming payments, record expenses, and generate financial reports without relying on multiple systems or complex accounting tools.
smallBusinesses.p3: By maintaining organized financial records and clear visibility into business performance, Sumu helps small businesses operate more efficiently and make better financial decisions.

oman.title: Built for Businesses in Oman
oman.p1: Sumu is designed to support businesses operating in Oman by enabling structured financial management aligned with local regulatory and tax requirements.
oman.p2: The platform helps businesses maintain organized financial records and generate reports that support compliance with the Oman Tax Authority requirements and local financial practices.

freelancers.heading: Professional Financial Tools for Independent Professionals
freelancers.p1: Freelancers and consultants often manage multiple clients, projects, and payments at the same time. Sumu provides a simple and reliable platform that helps independent professionals organize their financial activities and maintain professional billing processes.
freelancers.p2: With Sumu, freelancers can manage client information, issue invoices, track payments, and monitor income and expenses from one platform. This allows independent professionals to maintain clear financial records while focusing on delivering services to their clients.
freelancers.p3: Sumu helps freelancers maintain professional financial management without the complexity of traditional accounting systems, while maintaining clear financial control that supports growth.

benefits.b1: Manage client information and billing records
benefits.b2: Issue professional invoices and track payments
benefits.b5: Generate reports for financial tracking and tax preparation

accountants.heading: Structured Financial Records for Accounting Professionals
accountants.p1: Accounting professionals need reliable systems for structured records and accurate reporting. Sumu helps accountants and bookkeepers manage financial data efficiently.
accountants.p2: Maintain chart of accounts, record journal entries, track transactions, and generate reports — keeping records organized, transparent, and review-ready.
accountants.p3: Support your clients with accurate bookkeeping and clear financial oversight.

benefits.b1: Structured accounting records and financial data

growingBusinesses.heading: Scalable Financial Management for Expanding Companies
growingBusinesses.p1: As businesses grow, financial operations become more complex. Increasing transaction volumes, expanding client bases, and larger expense structures require more organized financial management systems.
growingBusinesses.p2: Sumu provides scalable financial tools that help growing companies maintain clear financial visibility while managing increasing operational complexity.
growingBusinesses.p3: By centralizing invoicing, payment tracking, expense management, accounting, and reporting, Sumu enables businesses to maintain structured financial records and support informed decision-making as the company expands.

benefits.b4: Generate financial reports for performance analysis
